overall.description: A first-person journey through Night City aboard the NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with exterior views of neon-lit megabuildings and holographic billboards before transitioning inside the train car to observe cybernetically enhanced passengers and futuristic interior details.

scene_state.functional_zone: train window view of cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: camera turns from exterior city view toward the train interior

agents.ego_description: observing the Night City skyline from the moving train window, watching holographic advertisements on passing buildings

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
large glowing advertisement displays floating between buildings
multi-level highway overpass with vehicle lights visible
tall building with prominent blue and orange neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside a moving train looking out at Night City's futuristic skyline. Towering megabuildings with illuminated windows and holographic advertisements dominate the view as the train travels along elevated tracks through the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: train car entrance with standing passengers

events.description: transitioning from mixed exterior lighting to artificial interior train lighting
begin walking down the train aisle from the entrance area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the window and entering the main passenger area of the train car

notable_agents.action: passenger with glowing green cybernetic headgear standing near the window

entered.detail: futuristic metro car interior with metal surfaces and fluorescent lighting
overhead information display showing NCART route data and time
green upholstered bench seats along the train walls
colorful illuminated tunnel arches visible briefly through the side window

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the exterior view into the train car, revealing the futuristic interior with standing passengers and cybernetically enhanced individuals. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent tubes as the camera enters the main passenger compartment and begins moving down the aisle.

events.description: slowing walking pace to observe seated passengers more carefully
passing through different train sections with varying wall advertisements and passenger arrangements

agents.ego_description: walking down the train aisle while observing the various passengers and cyberpunk details of the interior

notable_agents.action: seated passenger with visible cybernetic prosthetic arm resting on their knee
passenger sitting with legs crossed, looking at a device

entered.detail: narrow walkway between rows of seats with yellow safety lines on floor
yellow vertical handrails for standing passengers to grip
screen displaying various product advertisements above the seats
automatic sliding doors with glass windows between train cars

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through the train car aisle, passing seated passengers with various cybernetic implants and modifications. The interior features yellow support poles, digital advertisement screens, and scattered debris on the floor. The lighting remains consistently artificial with overhead fluorescent tubes illuminating the metal and plastic surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: train seating area with large exterior hologram visible

events.description: large pink holographic advertisement becomes visible through the train window

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the seated passengers and the large advertisement visible through the window

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing cap and sunglasses eating from a green carton
passenger with dark hair and cybernetic arm looking down at their lap

entered.detail: large pink holographic advertisement with bold text visible through the train window

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on two seated passengers in the foreground while a massive pink holographic advertisement dominates the view through the window behind them. The camera remains relatively stationary, capturing the detailed character models and the cyberpunk aesthetic of the advertising hologram against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sprawling neon exterior of Night City into the sterile, crowded interior of a moving metro car. It begins by looking out from the train at a futuristic skyline of towering megabuildings and holographic advertisements as the vehicle glides through an urban canyon. As the camera turns away from the city lights, the scene shifts into the passenger compartment, where the lighting changes to artificial fluorescent tubes and the view opens up to reveal cybernetically enhanced commuters. The camera then moves steadily down the aisle, passing yellow support poles and digital screens while gliding past seated passengers with visible implants. Finally, the movement slows to a focus on two passengers in the foreground, framed against a massive pink holographic advertisement glowing through the window against the night sky.
